title: Amtech M0950 150mm (6") Hacksaw and mitre Block
features: ADJUSTABLE BLADE TENSION: This hacksaw has a light alloy steel frame with a comfortable grip and features a blade tension adjustment knob
MITRE BLOCK: It is supplied with a light aluminium mitre block, with 45° and 90° angles and a box size of 140mm x 40mm x 20mm
BLADE INCLUDED: A 150mm (6") blade, 24 TPI is included
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
description: From the manufacturer About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Adjustable Blade Tension, Included Mitre Block with Angle Settings
